name: E-commerce Store
description: Product grid, shopping cart, and checkout flow with mock data. Ready to connect to a real backend.
ai_context: This is a React + Vite e-commerce store. App.jsx is the main component managing all state (products, cart, current view). Components: Navbar (cart count badge, nav links), ProductCard (image placeholder via CSS gradient, add to cart), Cart (line items, quantity +/-, remove, subtotal/total), Checkout (shipping form, order summary, place order saves to localStorage). All data is mock — 8 products defined in App.jsx. Cart state uses useState. No routing library — view switching via state ('shop'/'cart'/'checkout'/'confirmation'). Products have categories for filtering. CSS custom properties for theming in App.css. The user will likely ask to: add real product images, connect to Stripe/payment, add product detail pages, add categories/filters, add search, connect to a backend/CMS, add user accounts, add wishlist, add reviews, etc.
